channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: What is the release date for The Pitt season 2 episode 10 on HBO Max?
item.description: Dr. Robby has threatened to leave for the millionth time, but will it happen — and when does The Pitt season 2 episode 10 arrive on HBO Max?

item.title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
item.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

item.title: Electric air taxi maker Archer hits back at Joby in countersuit alleging concealed Chinese ties
item.description: Archer's countersuit comes four months after Joby sued its rival for alleged 'corporate espionage.'

item.title: Founders Fund nears $6B close for latest growth fund, sources say
item.description: The fresh fundraise comes less than a year after Founders Fund closed its third growth fund, a $4.6 billion vehicle intended primarily for follow-on investments in its successful late-stage companies.

item.title: ‘Bass-heads need not apply’: I tested a polished-sounding wireless speaker with an impeccable sense of space — it’s just a shame that it flubs the sub
item.description: I loved this wireless speaker’s ace connectivity and sense of space and but have to ask: where’s the bass?

item.title: Worried about Australian age verification measures? I've found the cheapest way to secure your personal data for years to come
item.description: New legislation is raising eyebrows, but there's some great ways to stay secure

item.title: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE review: So scary, Ill never play it again
item.description: 'Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE' review for PlayStation 5

item.title: How to watch Monterrey vs. Cruz Azul online for free
item.description: Watch Concacaf Champions Cup for free. Live stream Monterrey vs. Cruz Azul in the 2026 Concacaf Champions Cup for free.

item.title: Trump’s Transportation Secretary Promises the ‘Future of Aviation’ With New eVTOL Program
